title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Pay the Prior Year Expenditure Chargeable Against the Current Appropriation for Ionstructional Material Support to Three (3) Philippine High School for the Arts Teacher at Three Thousand Pesos Each Totaling to Nine Thousand Pesos (P 9,000.00) Under the Special Education Fund Cy 2023 Councilwoman Leren Mae M. Bautista 02/06/2023
